student1: AI Fundamentals (NG, 0 absences) and Machine Learning Intro (NG, 1 absence): contact both instructors this week to confirm if NGs are incompletes and get exact make-up deadlines; if not recoverable, re-enroll next term and adjust your load to prioritize these.

Software Engineering: B+ with 0 absences indicates performance, not attendance, held you back—review rubric deductions (testing/design) with the instructor and rewrite one project component before taking the follow-up.

Repeat Mechatronics (D) and Fluid Mechanics (D) next term; Ds usually do not satisfy ME prerequisites and will stall capstone sequencing.

Statistics (C, 4 absences): stop further absences, attend the next two office hours to review material from missed classes, and begin weekly tutoring until the next exam.
Confirm the CS program’s minimum Statistics grade; if a C falls short for ML/AI or Data Science electives, schedule a retake next term and delay those electives until the grade improves.
